design_decisions.choice: Tool registration pattern: Create RegisterCatalogTools as a separate function in internal/mcp/catalog.go, following the existing RegisterPlanTools(s *Server, repoRoot string) convention. Registered in cmd/sworn/mcp.go alongside the other three registrations. Stdlib is sufficient for this slice's text-file ops; no new dependency, no ADR required.

plan_release reuse of CreateRelease helper: The CreateRelease helper already exists in tools_plan.go (S08c's internal function). plan_release calls it for new releases and returns structured JSON. No duplication.

docs/considerations.md and docs/decisions.md format: Plain Markdown section structures (## design_system, ## architecture.patterns, ## [type] dimensions for considerations; ### <TYPE>: <title> entries for decisions). No YAML frontmatter needed — just parseable section headers for the status/dimension tools and full-text for search.

check_design_system options scaffold: Static three-option template (Reuse as-is / Extend with variant / Build new) emitted by the handler. The AI enriches it conversationally. No model call needed in the tool.

record_decision overrides convention: Follow the spec's append-only design. When overriding, record a new entry with overrides: <prior-decision-date> rather than editing. The overrides field is recorded in the decision entry body; no schema enforcement.

reachability_artifacts: manual-smoke-step: sworn mcp → connect Claude Code → call get_induction_status
open_deferrals: Semantic/vector search on decisions.md — post-R3. **Acknowledged**: Coach, 2026-06-20

violations: Gate 2: cmd/sworn/mcp.go changed (+1 line RegisterCatalogTools) but absent from spec.md Planned touchpoints and not explained in proof.md Divergence from plan. Fix: add one sentence to Divergence from plan.

Gate 3: proof.md Test results paraphrases trailing output with '[... 34 more pre-existing tests ...]' and shows go test ./internal/mcp/... -v -count=1 rather than the AC command -run Catalog. Fix: paste complete unparaphrased output.

Gate 3/Gate 6: AC2 requires slice_count at the top level of the plan_release existing-release response; implementation puts it inside state_summary. TestPlanReleaseExisting does not assert slice_count. Fix: (a) promote slice_count to top-level in catalog.go response; (b) add slice_count assertion to TestPlanReleaseExisting against a known-count fixture.
